app-title: Great Western Trail 2nd Edition Setup Randomizer
further-steps-step1: From the Kansas City supply, draw 7 tiles with a on their back and place them one after the other onto the game board. Where a tile is placed depends on its type:
further-steps-step1a: If it is an outlaw tile (green or orange), place it in the outlaw section onto the empty space with the lowest number (1 to 9).
further-steps-step1b: If it is a hazard tile, place it in its corresponding hazard section (flood, drought or rockfall) onto the empty space with the lowest number (1 to 4). If there is no empty space left, return it to the bag and draw a new tile.
further-steps-step2: Start drawing tiles with a 2 on their back (which include only worker tiles). Put these worker tiles one after the other in the job market as follows:
further-steps-step21: Start in the top row and place the first drawn tile onto the space directly beneath the player count sign of your actual player count.
further-steps-step22: Place the next tile onto the space to the right of that tile and continue like this rightwards.
further-steps-step23: After you have placed a tile onto the rightmost space of the top row, continue along the second row, where you place the next tile yet again onto the space in line with your player count sign.
further-steps-step24: Then continue like this rightwards until you place a tile onto the space to the left of the job market token. This is the last tile. So depending on your player count, there are now 3, 5 or 7 worker tiles in the job market.
further-steps-step3: Now fill the 6 foresight spaces in Kansas City with tiles from the Kansas City supply:
further-steps-step31: Draw 2 tiles with a 1 on their back and place them face up onto the two foresight spaces marked 1
further-steps-step32: Draw 2 tiles with a 2 on their back and place them face up onto the two foresight spaces marked 2
further-steps-step33: Draw 2 tiles with a 3 on their back and place them face up onto the two foresight spaces marked 3.
further-steps-step4: Shuffle the 36 market cattle cards and place them as a face-down market cattle stack beneath the lower left of the game board. Depending on your player count, draw a number of cattle cards from this stack:
further-steps-step4_simmental: Add all 8 stage 1 "Simmental" cattle cards to the 36 market cattle cards, shuffle them and place them as a face-down market cattle stack beneath the lower left of the game board. Place the Simmental market tile on the game board so that it covers the corresponding area of the cattle market. Then, depending on your player count, draw a number of cattle cards from this stack:
further-steps-step4_brahman: Add all 8 "Brahman" cattle cards to the 36 market cattle cards, shuffle them and place them as a face-down market cattle stack beneath the lower left of the game board. Place the Simmental market tile on the game board so that it covers the corresponding area of the cattle market.
further-steps-simmental2: Progress as usual but place the orange cattle cards to the very left (if there are any).
further-steps-simmental3: Take the stage 2 and stage 3 cards and place them in separate stacks next to the game board (close to Kansas City)
further-steps-brahman: Progress as usual but place the orange cattle cards to the very left (if there are any).
further-steps-step5: Shuffle the 24 objective cards and place them as a face-down stack to the right of the game board. Then reveal 4 cards from this stack and display them face up in a column below the stack
further-steps-step61: 1st player: 6 dollars, 4 cards and 1 exchange token
further-steps-step62: 2nd player: 7 dollars, 5 cards and 1 exchange token
further-steps-step63: 3rd player: 8 dollars, 6 cards and 1 exchange token
further-steps-step64: 4th player: 9 dollars, 7 cards and 1 exchange token
further-steps-step7: Place the extension board above the base game board and slide it over the top edge, covering the original city strip with the new city strip.
further-steps-step8: Shuffle the 10 medium town tiles face down. Then draw 6 of these tiles and place one at random face up onto each of the 6 medium town spaces on the extension board. Return the 4 spare tiles to the box.
further-steps-step9: Add the 2 new station master tiles to the ones from the base game and shuffle these 11 tiles.
further-steps-step91: Place one at random face up onto each of the 5 station master spaces of the base game board.
further-steps-step92: Then place one at random face up onto each of the 2 station master spaces of the extension board.
further-steps-step93: Return the remaining 4 tiles to the box.
further-steps-step10: Receive the following items of your color:
further-steps-step101: The new private building tile, which you add to your other building tiles. (As always, all players must have the same sides of their building tiles face up.)
further-steps-step102: The auxiliary add-on, which you place to the left of your player board.
further-steps-step103: The additional player dise, which you place onto the colored disc space of your auxiliary add-on.
further-steps-step104: The 15 branchlets, which you place in groups of 3 onto each of the 5 rows of your auxiliary add-on.
further-steps-step11: Add the 4 new objective cards with the expansion icon * to the 24 objective cards of the base game. Shuffle those 28 objective cards and place them as a face-down stack to the right of the game board. Then reveal 4 cards from this stack and display them face up in a column below the stack. This display is called the genereal objective display.
further-steps-step11_1: Add the 1 new starting objective card with the expansion icon * to the 4 starting objective cards of the base game. Shuffle those 5 starting objective cards and deal each player one random card, which you place face up below your player board. This is the first card of your personal objective area.
further-steps-step11_2: Finally, return any remaining starting objective cards to the box.
further-steps-step11_3: If you are playing the Simmental or Brahman variant you may further add the 4 new objective cards and the 1 new starting objective card with the orange cattle icon the same way.

variant-warning.title: Editor's note
variant-warning.content: Even though it is possible to add both the "Brahman" and the "Simmental" cattle cards, we do not recommend this because it completely changes the balance of the market cattle stack. That's why we decide to use the same color for the 2 different types of cattle cards.
